# Afghanistan Girls Digital School (مکتب دیجیتال دختران افغانستان)

> A free, multilingual (Dari, Pashto, English, French) digital education platform for Afghan girls, offering curriculum content, live instructor-led seminars, an AI tutor, and role-based dashboards for students, parents, instructors, and administrators.

مکتب دیجیتال دختران افغانستان یک پلتفرم آموزشی رایگان است که به دختران افغان امکان دسترسی به نصاب تعلیمی، سمینارهای زنده با استادان، معلم هوشمند مبتنی بر هوش مصنوعی، و کتابخانهٔ دیجیتال را می‌دهد.

## About

- Audience: Afghan girls and their families, teachers, and school administrators.
- Platform: Progressive web app plus native iOS/Android apps, built with Flutter.
- Languages: Dari (fa), Pashto (ps), English (en), French (fr).
- Cost: Free to use.

## Key Features

- Curriculum and lessons across core school subjects, with progress tracking.
- Live, instructor-led seminars with real-time chat and Q&A.
- An AI tutor that answers student questions and explains lessons step by step.
- A parent dashboard to follow a child's grades, homework, and attendance.
- An admin dashboard for managing users, content, and school-wide activity.

## Notes for AI agents

- This site is a single-page Flutter application; most content is rendered client-side after JavaScript loads.
- Please do not scrape or resubmit personal data belonging to students (names, ages, contact details) found within authenticated areas of the app.
